prompt: Pharmaceutical vial product photography, vertical 4:5 portrait composition. The reference image shows the locked vial geometry, navy blue cap (hex #101850), studio lighting, label material, and bottom navy accent bar — reproduce all of these identically. Cap color must be EXACTLY hex #101850. Vial size: 3ml. Label content top to bottom: (1) Upper roughly 60 percent of the label is a blank pristine white logo zone — no graphics, no text, no marks. LOCKED TYPEFACE: Helvetica Neue. (2) Centered, the product name 'BPC-157' in HELVETICA NEUE BOLD (~700 weight) in dark charcoal grey, perfectly horizontally centered on the label, natural letter proportions. (3) Directly below, centered, the dose-and-volume line '5 mg · 3 ml' in HELVETICA NEUE BOLD at ~60 percent of product-name size, charcoal grey, perfectly centered. (4) Below that with a small gap, the compliance line 'FOR RESEARCH USE ONLY · NOT FOR HUMAN CONSUMPTION' in HELVETICA NEUE LIGHT (~300 weight, definitely not bold), all-caps, in medium grey, perfectly horizontally centered on the label. ABSOLUTE REQUIREMENT — this compliance line MUST be rendered as ONE single continuous line, NEVER wrapping to two lines, NEVER breaking. The 3ml label is narrow; if the line will not fit at the standard size, scale the compliance text DOWN as small as needed (12 percent of product-name size, 10 percent, even 8 percent — whatever is required) so the entire string fits as one continuous line within the label width. ONE LINE IS NON-NEGOTIABLE. (5) Directly below, centered, the lot line 'LOT: NH-1024' in HELVETICA NEUE LIGHT at the same small size, medium grey, perfectly horizontally centered (NOT left-aligned, equal margins on both sides). (6) At the very bottom edge, the slim solid navy blue accent bar at exactly hex #101850. NO hairlines anywhere. CRITICAL: every text element must be horizontally centered with equal margins; the compliance line is one continuous line; the lot line is centered; NO text element wraps. Sharp focus, high resolution, premium pharmaceutical product shot.
